items.title: 2026/578: Methodist Church, Hurstlands, Hurst Green, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 0HG
items.description: Demolition of deconsecrated church building. Redevelopment of former methodist church site to provide a four-storey block of sixteen flats, comprising six one-bedroom flats, eight two-bedroom flats and two three-bedroom flats
items.headline: Plans to Replace Hurst Green Church with 16 Flats
items.summary: A planning application has been submitted to demolish the deconsecrated Methodist Church on Hurstlands in Hurst Green. The site would be redeveloped as a four-storey block of 16 flats, including six one-bedroom, eight two-bedroom and two three-bedroom homes.

data.address: Methodist Church, Hurstlands, Hurst Green, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 0HG

items.summary: Plans have been submitted to split the garden of Foyle Cottage on Red Lane and build three detached houses. The scheme also includes new landscaping, parking and a vehicle access.

items.headline: Tandridge Golf Club submits nature plans for driving range work
items.summary: The club has filed details on biodiversity and habitat management linked to its approved plan to reconfigure, extend and enclose the driving range on Godstone Road. The submission aims to discharge two conditions set out when permission was granted in June 2026.

items.title: 2026/743/TPO: 8 Farley Park, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 9HY
items.description:
Please refer to photos provided: 
T1) - Red Oak on right-hand side of front garden - To crown reduce to previous points, removing up to 2m growth to a residual height of 14m and crown spread of 11m. Crown lifted to 5m from ground level over road and 2.5m over garden / driveway. Removing limbs <10cm dia. Repeat pruning for good arboricultural management.
items.headline: Pruning planned for protected oak in Farley Park garden
items.summary: A tree application has been submitted to prune a red oak in the front garden of 8 Farley Park, Oxted. The work would reduce the crown by up to 2 metres and lift lower branches as part of routine tree care.

data.address: 8 Farley Park, Oxted, Surrey, RH8 9HY

items.headline: Tree work sought for broken pine branch in Limpsfield
items.summary: An application has been made to remove a branch from a protected Corsican pine at Hunters End on Uvedale Road, Limpsfield. The lowest branch has twisted and half broken, leaving it hanging over the property, and the plan is to cut it back to the main stem.
